description_long: This bungalow features a striking modern design with a large, slanted roof constructed from what appears to be wooden planks, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The roof overhangs the main structure, providing shade and architectural interest, while the building itself sits on a geometric black-and-white patterned base. The walls are predominantly dark, possibly made of glass or polished stone, with angular, asymmetric lines and minimal ornamentation. The structure is single-storied, with no visible porch, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically, some integrated into the roofline. The overall look is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on bold contrasts and clean lines. The bungalow is likely to be found in a modern urban neighborhood, standing out due to its unique roof and geometric base.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a large slanted wooden roof, dark angular walls, and a geometric patterned base. The design is sleek and contemporary, with asymmetrical window placement and bold visual contrasts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the slanted wooden roof and the geometric patterned base, with angular dark walls and some window openings visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide overhanging roof, the narrow facade, and the entrance area, with the geometric base pattern visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the roof's slope, the angular wall design, and the continuation of the geometric base pattern.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the wooden roof's structure and the rectangular footprint of the bungalow, with the patterned base visible around the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with some windows integrated into the roofline
